allocations.name: Validators / Staking / Network Security
allocations.split_note: The 22.00% validator/security allocation is split into the Validator Security Pool plus five explicit genesis validator self-stake allocations.

canonicalization.network_magic_note: network_magic_bytes is derived after final genesis_hash and excluded from genesis_hash to avoid circular identity.

genesis_message.value: 16 May 2026 - Synergy Testnet chain 1264 resets the public testnet with a post-quantum Proof of Synergy network with cluster-local certified DAG data availability and dual-quorum finality.

header.extra_data: 16 May 2026 - Synergy Testnet chain 1264 resets the public testnet with a post-quantum Proof of Synergy network with cluster-local certified DAG data availability and dual-quorum finality.

eip155.activation_condition: Activate only when EVM/EIP-155 compatibility is implemented and publicly supported.

policy.governance_rule: Any addition, removal, activation, or semantic reassignment requires DAO approval and SNTS amendment.
